_fixture_meta.source: DOCS-DERIVED — built from the official Paddle Billing transaction.completed payload shape for a SUBSCRIPTION cycle (developer.paddle.com), per the 8-field docs pass. NOT a real captured payload.
_fixture_meta.reconcile: Must be reconciled byte-for-byte against a REAL captured payload during live verification after the webhook ships (see ./README.md two-layer plan). OPEN QUESTIONS for Layer 2: (1) does the FIRST charge carry custom_data.user_id, or only the checkout's web origin? (2) do RENEWALS carry custom_data at all (#4)? (3) exact data.origin enum for first-charge vs renewal — used only to corroborate, never to decide.
_fixture_meta.locks: subscription_id NON-null (distinguishes from pack), items[0].price.id = SUB price, details.totals.grand_total is a STRING, custom_data carries user_id, data.origin is corroboration-only
